meaning: adj.致命的,重大的,命运注定的,不幸的,致命的,毁灭性的
examples: There was a fatal flaw in the plan.
Even moderate amounts of the drug can be fatal.
It is impossible to say who struck the fatal blow.
The UN has warned the homes would be "an almost fatal blow" to peace hopes.
But before I ever made it to the trail, I witnessed a fatal road accident.
